visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man with short brown hair, wearing a brown and orange horizontal striped t-shirt, stands in front of a plain light gray wall. He holds a bottle of blue and white 'Salat' dish soap in his right hand and a black smartphone in his left, speaking excitedly to the camera with high facial mobility. (2) A close-up shot focuses on the 'Salat' dish soap bottle being held, showing the packaging details clearly against the neutral background. (3) The man continues his explanation, pointing to his phone screen and the soap bottle. He gestures with his hands to emphasize his points while maintaining direct eye contact with the lens. (4) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a gray shirt, appears briefly in a cutaway shot. She is leaning on a white table and smiling broadly while listening to the man's narrative. (5) The man is shown pouring the liquid from the large 'Salat' bottle into a clear, square pump dispenser bottle on a white table. He works carefully, focusing on the task. (6) Now wearing a colorful, wide-patterned headband, the man pumps white foam onto his hands and applies it generously to his face. He looks into the camera with wide eyes and a look of comedic wonder. (7) He bends over a clear plastic basin filled with water, rinsing the foam off his face. The lighting is bright and even, highlighting the wet texture of his skin as he checks it with his fingers. (8) The scene shifts to a bathroom where the man is leaning over a white bathtub. He is washing his hair with the soap under a running showerhead, creating a thick white lather on his head. (9) A woman's hands are seen rubbing white soap foam onto the man's bare back while he sits in the bathtub. The bathroom setting features light-colored tiles and chrome fixtures. (10) Back in a room setting, the man and the woman stand together. He points to his left and right arms, explaining a comparison test to the woman. He finishes by scratching his arm with a grimace.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 他說沙拉脫的成分呢. (2) [Subtitle]: 跟沐浴乳一樣. (3) [Subtitle]: 只是沐浴乳. (4) [Subtitle]: 它有加這個香精. (5) [Subtitle]: 然後還有洗起來. (6) [Subtitle]: 會讓皮膚滑滑的成分. (7) [Subtitle]: 這樣而已. (8) [Variety]: 沙拉脫洗臉 (暗黑版). [Logo]: 南臺科技大學 19/10/26 03:12. (9) [Subtitle]: 還真的有一篇在分享. (10) [Variety]: 高中開始. (11) [Subtitle]: 用沙拉脫開始洗臉之後呢. (12) [Subtitle]: 他說他的臉啊. (13) [Subtitle]: 就變成. (14) [Variety]: 嬰兒般Q彈粉嫩. (15) [Subtitle]: 這如果成功喔. (16) [Logo]: hahahababy. (17) [Subtitle]: 看要不要. (18) [Subtitle]: 跟我買這個配方... (19) [Subtitle]: 賣爆. (20) [Subtitle]: 綿密的泡泡. (21) [Subtitle]: 剛好我這邊長一顆痘痘. (22) [Subtitle]: 洗一個禮拜看會不會掉. (23) [Subtitle]: 沒有乾啊. (24) [Variety]: 以為會澀澀. (25) [Subtitle]: 哇塞滑滑的呢. (26) [Subtitle]: 滑滑的內. (27) [Subtitle]: 竟然不是乾乾的. (28) [Subtitle]: 好出乎我想像. (29) [Subtitle]: 因為你. (30) [Subtitle]: 那個沙拉脫洗起來. (31) [Subtitle]: 本來就滑滑的. (32) [Subtitle]: 這頭髮上是滑滑的. (33) [Variety]: 我好像盤子. (34) [Variety]: 很像一個碗公. (35) [Subtitle]: 溫柔一點. (36) [Variety]: 第一天上班喔!. (37) [Subtitle]: 我左手. (38) [Subtitle]: 用沙拉脫洗. (39) [Subtitle]: 右手用沐浴乳洗. (40) [Subtitle]: 你摸摸看有什麼分別. (41) [Subtitle]: 這比較嫩滑. (42) [Subtitle]: 騙你的~. (43) [Subtitle]: 其實是反過來. (44) [Subtitle]: 沒有啦. (45) [Subtitle]: 我覺得開始有一點癢.

visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The main male has short, styled brown hair and wears an orange and brown horizontal striped t-shirt with a white collar. Later he wears a colorful headband.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A clean, modern indoor environment with light gray walls. The bathroom features white tiles, a white bathtub, and chrome shower fixtures. A white table is used for the soap demonstration.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy male speech begins immediately with a bright, excited tone. An upbeat, rhythmic electronic BGM track plays at a moderate volume. A sharp 'whoosh' SFX indicates a transition. (2) Vocal intensity remains high as the male voice describes the product. Background laughter from a female voice is heard briefly. A comedic 'boing' SFX plays. (3) Sound of liquid pouring and splashing into a container is clearly audible over the music. The male speaker's pace is fast and rhythmic. (4) Multiple short 'pop' sound effects play in rapid succession as captions appear on the screen. The acoustic environment shifts slightly to include bathroom reverb. (5) Loud sound of running water from a showerhead dominates the ambient track. The male voice continues with an exaggerated, struggling vocal quality while 'washing.' (6) A sharp 'ding' sound effect marks a new phase of the experiment. Vocal dialogue between the male and female characters is clear and well-balanced against the BGM. (7) The BGM swells slightly for the punchline. A final comedic riser SFX leads to a hard cut of silence as the video ends.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To entertain the audience by testing a questionable internet myth that dish soap can be used as a high-quality skin and hair cleanser. The video uses exaggerated humor and a 'do-it-yourself' experiment format to create comedic content.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video features the product in a comedic and potentially harmful context (using dish soap on skin/face), which is inconsistent with professional brand endorsement.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video is a typical high-energy Taiwanese social media clip featuring influencer Tsai Aga. The core appeal lies in the absurdity of using industrial-strength dish soap for personal hygiene.
